input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.2.5.6 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.2.5.6
            TITLE: the lap belts must attach by one of the two:

            CONTENT:
            rule T.2.5.6: The Lap Belts must attach by one of the two:
T.2.5.6 The Lap Belts must attach by one of the two: 
a. Bolt or eyebolt through a welded tube insert or tested monocoque attachment  F.7.9 
b. Bolt or clip to a tab or bracket ( T.2.4.3 ) on a tube frame

final_answer: rule T.2.5.6: The Lap Belts must attach by one of the two: T.2.5.6 The Lap Belts must attach by one of the two: a. Bolt or eyebolt through a welded tube insert or tested monocoque attachment F.7.9 b. Bolt or clip to a tab or bracket ( T.2.4.3 ) on a tube frame
